name: Reflex Happy Hour Cat Treat Urinary 60g
description: Give your cat the perfect combination of taste and nutrition with Reflex Happy Hours Cat Treats delicious, crunchy bites crafted to support your feline’s overall health and happiness. Made with high-quality chicken protein and enriched with blueberry, flaxseed, and natural extracts , these treats provide a satisfying crunch while delivering essential nutrients that contribute to a healthy, active lifestyle. Each morsel is packed with essential vitamins and minerals including Vitamins A, D3, and E, plus Zinc and Selenium to help maintain strong bones, glossy fur, and a robust immune system. Added taurine supports heart and eye health, while the crunchy texture helps clean teeth and gums , promoting excellent dental hygiene. These treats are free from artificial additives and are carefully formulated for cats of all breeds and ages. Whether you’re rewarding good behavior or simply sharing a happy moment, Reflex Happy Hours Cat Treats make every snack time special. Key Features Crunchy texture helps support dental health Enriched with vitamins and minerals for overall wellness Contains taurine for heart and vision support Made with natural ingredients — chicken, blueberry & flaxseed No artificial additives or preservatives Perfect for rewarding or daily snacking Ingredients Processed chicken protein, corn, rice, corn gluten, chicken fat, liver flavor, powdered cellulose, vitamins and minerals, DL-methionine, brewer's yeast, salt, blueberry, marigold extract, rosemary extract, flaxseed, yucca schidigera, xylooligosaccharide (XOS), taurine (3a370), preservatives and antioxidants (E320 & E321). Nutrient Components Crude Protein: 32% Fat Content: 16% Raw Ash: 3% Crude Fiber: 8% Moisture Content: 10% Nutritional Additives Minerals: Iron, Iodine, Copper, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium Vitamins: A, D₃, E, C, B-complex, K₃, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate Feeding Recommendations Suitable for adult cats ; can be consumed entirely in one meal. Adjust serving size based on temperature, activity, and lifestyle. Always provide fresh, clean drinking water . Store in a cool, dry place and reseal packaging after use. Not suitable for human consumption. Make every moment a celebration with Reflex Happy Hours Cat Treats the crunchy, nutritious way to show your cat some love!
